headline: Masco Corporation Announces $300 Million Accelerated Share Repurchase
summary: LIVONIA, Mich., May 07, 2026--Masco Corporation (NYSE: MAS), today announced it has entered into an accelerated share repurchase ("ASR") agreement with Royal Bank of Canada to repurchase $300 million of Masco’s common stock.

headline: A Look At Masco (MAS) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Masco (MAS) has drawn fresh attention after recent share moves, with the stock up about 21% over the past month and 1.2% over the past 3 months based on provided returns. See our latest analysis for Masco. At a share price of $71.95, Masco’s recent 20.5% 1 month share price return sits alongside a 1 year total shareholder return of 21.3%, pointing to momentum that has strengthened over the shorter term.
